title: Source code for the fully integrated and automated 24-sample microfluidic system for sample-in-profile-out forensic analysis
author: Li, Jichen
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0
description: This project releases the complete LabVIEW source code from the paper    "A Fully Integrated and Automated 24-Sample Microfluidic System for Sample-in-Profile-out Forensic Analysis,"    implementing a fully integrated microfluidic control system for automated forensic DNA profiling. The system leverages the LabVIEW platform to perform core functions including microvalve control, PCR thermal cycling, and data acquisition, enabling end-to-end, parallelized processing of up to 24 samples with minimal user intervention.
steps_raw: This project releases the complete LabVIEW source code from the paper    "A Fully Integrated and Automated 24-Sample Microfluidic System for Sample-in-Profile-out Forensic Analysis,"    implementing a fully integrated microfluidic control system for automated forensic DNA profiling. The system leverages the LabVIEW platform to perform core functions including microvalve control, PCR thermal cycling, and data acquisition, enabling end-to-end, parallelized processing of up to 24 samples with minimal user intervention.
